segments.text: For the director of music. According to gittith. Of the Sons of Korah. A psalm.
How lovely is your dwelling place, O LORD Almighty!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: for the sons: or, of the sons

segments.text: My soul yearns, even faints, for the courts of the LORD; my heart and my flesh cry out for the living God.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Even the sparrow has found a home, and the swallow a nest for herself, where she may have her young—a place near your altar, LORD Almighty, my King and my God.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Blessed are those who dwell in your house; they are ever praising you.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Blessed are those whose strength is in you, whose hearts are set on pilgrimage.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: As they pass through the Valley of Baca, they make it a place of springs; the autumn rains also cover it with pools.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: Baca…: or, mulberry trees make him a well, etc

segments.text: They go from strength to strength, till each appears before God in Zion.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: strength to…: or, company to company

segments.text: Hear my prayer, LORD God Almighty; listen to me, God of Jacob.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Look on our shield, O God; look with favor on your anointed one.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Better is one day in your courts than a thousand elsewhere; I would rather be a doorkeeper in the house of my God than dwell in the tents of the wicked.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: I had…: Heb. I would choose rather to sit at the threshold

segments.text: For the LORD God is a sun and shield; the LORD bestows favor and honor; no good thing does he withhold from those whose walk is blameless.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: LORD Almighty, blessed is the one who trusts in you.
segments.speaker: Psalmist
